description: Port src/app/api/billing/payment-method/route.ts into a deployed Lambda route. The patient app calls this to start a Stripe payment-method setup flow without creating a charge/subscription. Scope: verify Cognito session from cookie; resolve Stripe API secret; resolve return URLs from configured public site/app origin rather than Next request state; call preparePaymentMethodCollection using the DynamoDB billing repository and Stripe client; return existing statuses (checkout_session_created with checkoutUrl/session id, payment_method_already_collected, payment_not_ready, clinical_declined, billing_unavailable); ensure Stripe metadata uses only opaque IDs; set no-store headers. Wire POST /api/billing/payment-method in CDK with DynamoDB and Secrets Manager permissions. Acceptance criteria: live route no longer returns 404; unit tests cover unauthenticated, missing config, payment not ready, already collected, clinical declined, and checkout session created; no PHI is sent to Stripe metadata.
title: Add Lambda/API Gateway route for POST /api/billing/payment-method
